headline: 3 Stocks With Upgraded Broker Ratings As Markets Hit All-Time High
summary: Broker upgrades focus on BIIB, TEL and ZTO as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at record highs on hopes U.S.-Iran peace holds.
